calendar.matters:
Petn. For Court Supervision Of Conservatee'S Trust
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Called with case number 289328. Lillian Ng appearing for Rena Harel. Bart Cchenone appearing for Wesley Chang. Derek Jacobson and Ligia Parmenter appearing for Linda Holm Nishimura. No opposition to bringing the trust under court supervision. Matter granted. Order signed.

In case number 289328, Estate of Arvid Holm. Case is almost settled. All parties agreed to have Rena Harel appointed as administrator w/wa. Bond is fixed in the amount of $650,000.00. Matter granted. Order signed. Ms. Ng will petition ex parte for approval of settlement agreement.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petn. For Court Supervision Of Conservatee'S Trust
Off Calendar Dec-14-2006 Continued To Jan-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel, or interested persons.

After noting that no appearance was made, the Court took the matter under submission for Examiner review.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Floyd Butler #2518; Court Investigator: Melinda Gean; Bailiff: Mizota; Clerk: C. Joy Guandique.
